# Phase 3: Validation Report

*This document is generated by the db-migration agent during Phase 3.*

## Status: Pending

Run Phase 2 first, then Phase 3 will validate the migration.

## Expected Contents

- Data integrity: row-count comparison (all tables)
- Functional equivalence: pgtap test results
- DAB API regression: REST endpoint comparison
- Performance: perf-001 through perf-010 results with trending
- Security: sec-001 through sec-010 results
- Migration readiness score
- Iteration history (run-001, run-002, ...)
